props.name: color
props.description: Customizes the color of the lines (RGB).

props.name: amplitude
props.description: Adjusts the intensity of the wave effect on the lines.

props.name: distance
props.description: Controls the spacing between the lines. A value of 0 means no offset.

props.name: enableMouseInteraction
props.description: Enables smooth mouse hover effects that modulate the line's movement and amplitude.
